name: Concho Resources Inc.
description: Concho Resources Inc. was an independent oil and natural gas company engaged in the acquisition, development, exploration, and production of oil and natural gas properties. The company's operations were focused in the Permian Basin of Southeast New Mexico and West Texas. In January 2021, Concho Resources was acquired by ConocoPhillips, combining two premier portfolios to create a leading independent exploration and production company.
